title: cleistanthus orgyalis
intro: Cleistanthus orgyalis, also known as the Chinese Thunder of God vine, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. Cleistanthus orgyalis is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating respiratory infections. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and it can be taken in various herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and teas.
